name: Deep research sales lead magnet agent
description: Takes a company or topic, performs deep web research via Exa, scrapes key sources with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to synthesize a comprehensive lead-magnet research report, and saves it to Google Docs. Adapted from n8n's Deep Research Sales Lead Magnet Agent workflow.

source.originalName: Deep Research - Sales Lead Magnet Agent

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for deep scraping

docsKey.description: Google Docs connection key for saving the report

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for research updates

researchTopic.description: Topic or company to deeply research (e.g. 'AI in healthcare 2025 trends')

targetAudience.description: Who the lead magnet report targets

steps.name: Search Exa for primary research sources
Deep scrape top sources with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for lead magnet report
Create Google Docs document for the report
Build document content for Google Docs update
Write report content to Google Docs
Build Slack Block Kit report notification
